success.description: As above, and all followers of Nurgle within long range add to Spellcraft checks while this action is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: All characters within long range suffer 1 corruption per disease they are afflicted by

challenge.description: Effect: While this action is recharging, Epidemius and all followers of Nurgle within long range of him recover 1 wound as the end of each round, and all other characters within long range of him add to Resilience checks

success.description: As above, and each enemy character within close range must make a Disease X check, where X is the amount of Cunning dice used to enhance this action (maximum 3)

boon.description: Each enemy character within close range suffer 1 fatigue

bane.description: You lose 1 Cunning die from your dice budget
